observation: MakerDAO described ETH volatility, Ethereum congestion, and DAI liquidity stress during the March 12, 2020 market collapse
market_health_use: Track combined collateral-price, network, and settlement-asset stress during liquidation windows

observation: CoinDesk reported that about $8 million in MakerDAO collateral was won through zero-bid auctions
market_health_use: Measure auction-clearing failure and user collateral loss

observation: CoinDesk reported on Blocknative research linking mempool manipulation and congestion to the zero-bid auction outcomes
market_health_use: Monitor transaction-inclusion access as a liquidation-market abuse vector

observation: MakerDAO documentation describes collateral auctions as the mechanism for recovering debt from liquidated vaults
market_health_use: Compare auction duration, bid competition, and keeper participation against stress conditions

observation: CoinDesk reported that MakerDAO governance rejected MKR-funded compensation for affected Black Thursday vault users
market_health_use: Track governance recovery decisions as long-tail market-confidence signals
